sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Track W cell size over transitions
for i, t in enumerate(transitions):
    w_nodes = [n for n in t.after_frame.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W']
    if w_nodes:
        total_w = sum(n['pixels'] for n in w_nodes)
        print(f"Transition {i}: action={t.action}, total W pixels={total_w}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
